item.title: What Happened Today #43
item.description: Turning planes around. Erasing scientists. Seizing sacred land. Trump isn’t just making moves—he’s rewriting the rules. A judge halts mid-air deportations. A haunting video exposes Khalil’s arrest. Norms vanish: Fauci erased, monuments threatened, the Kennedy Center put under his thumb. Even law firms aren’t safe. ⚡ Stay informed. Stay engaged. ? Subscribe free → govbrief.today ? Share this. Post it. Keep the spotlight on. #GovBriefToday #Resist2025 1. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/government-shutdown-vote-senate-gop-measure/ 2. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c05mvr3j3yro 3. https://abcnews.go.com/International/wireStory/hamas-release-american-israeli-hostage-truce-agreement-implemented-119825933 4. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/15/trump-deportation-lawsuit-00232121 5. https://apnews.com/video/attorneys-for-mahmoud-khalil-release-video-of-his-arrest-4b05368c85c2418aa04d0d1e1155798d 6. https://www.desertsun.com/story/news/environment/2025/03/15/is-trump-trying-to-eliminate-chuckwalla-sattitla-national-monuments/82456163007/ 7. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/a-mural-of-anthony-fauci-was-meant-to-inspire-staff-then-nih-took-it-down/ar-AA1AYsDt 8. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/15/arts/music/trump-kennedy-center-honors.html 9. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/15/trump-executive-order-paul-weiss-law-firm/82445507007/ 10. https://thehill.com/business/5197164-hundreds-protest-tesla-showrooms-over-musks-doge-work/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: When you make fire with Flint & Steel, you are shaving off pieces of steel, that's how hard flint is
item.dc:creator: Cliperinoposterino

item.title: Backlogged memes: ides of March probably
item.description:
If sleeping with Natalie Portman doesn’t fix you nothing can I guess Hello everyone my book releases in a week and I am broken in body and spirit have some memes nothing matters
I am the one on the right rn and it is probably the weathers fault.
Miss Piggy could fix the world if we let her
Not true, a common land serf probably had a way better life than we do. And don’t anyone @me about life expectancy and shit without bringing receipts because hyperfixating on late medieval culture is kinda my thing.
He certainly doesn’t have the intelligence of one
I have 95,000 words on book 2 but they are all wrong words and without my adhd meds I am doomed and I am sliding further and further into madness
Instant green flag for me and any sane mature woman
Irl Rose (main character of my book it’s hard to explain)
Not after seeing what else they’re attracted to. I ain’t competing with no damn mcchicken
The sad thing is this would work on me and already has (arcane) (I am obsessed btw I’m so mad I slept on it for so long it’s flawless) Anyway https://discord.com/channels/1324061866544332893/1324061867181871146 here’s the party I am throwing on discord until my book is released, it’s been fun and I’ll host a giveaway on the 25th
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: Some of my recent nocturnal oil paintings

item.title: I JUST FINISHED PAINTING THIS PIECE!
item.description: I just finished painting this oil painting on commission after nearly 1 month and a half of work! Both me and my customer are very happy with the result! If you'd like to support me further: ---› One-time donations: paypal.me/anisjerbi ---› Monthly donations: patreon.com/anis_jerbi_art To commission an artwork from me, contact me here on instagram or via my official website: anisjerbi.com
item.dc:creator: AnisJerbi

.

.

.
.

item.dc:creator: GirlUndone

item.title: Long COVID and Prudential Insurance drove my friend to end his life.
item.description: My friend Brian took his own life on Monday after nearly 5 years of long COVID and having his disability rejected by Prudential. The man was suffering terribly, and those ghouls rejected him. I am livid. RIP, brother. FUCK this system and the mother fuckers profiting from our suffering.
item.dc:creator: Picdump2508

item.title: There is a 0% chance Canadians want to become Americans.
item.description: Don't believe random internet posts. Do your own research. Then come back with your own research why you believe Canada should become the 51st state. I will wait here patiently and then tell you to fuck off. :-) And to fuck off a bit more after that.
item.dc:creator: B0reas

item.title: Some Programming Humor For A Niche Audience (BLESSED I.T. SUNDAY) #117
item.description:
1_WhatIsThisCreature
2_WhenYouTellAsianDadThatYouWIllNotBeAProgammer
3_WriteThisDown
4_GoodThingTheyWrappedTheCablesInNiceCircularObjectsOtherwiseItCouldHaveBeenAMess
5
6_FoundInTheWild
7_WebsitesTheseDays
8_LeastToxicProductManager
9
10_WhatIsHolePics
11
12_GuysWeShouldStartOurOwnTechStartUp
13_ITSupportInOtherSItuations_part_1
14_ITSupportInOtherSItuations_part_2
15. It do be like that. My favorite moment is when a player asked me how much I get in funding and I just told the truth: "What funding? I just exploit myself for cheap labor" :D But anyway, thank you for making it to the end of the dump, if you like my style of humor and dumps, please consider wishlisting my game Do Not Press The Button (Or You'll Delete The Multiverse). Currently working on the release date announcement trailer (Boyyyy it's coming soooon!) Thank you for considering this and for being part of this journey. I couldn’t do this without you. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have an amazing SUNDAY!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
